overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The journey progresses from elevated highways and tunnels through commercial districts with digital billboards, ending in a smoky industrial wasteland with burning wreckage.

events.description: approaching dark tunnel entrance ahead through heavy rain

agents.ego_description: driving on rain-slicked elevated highway toward tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: driving ahead in same lane with visible red taillights

entered.detail: continuous yellow safety barrier along left side of highway
tall overhead street lamps illuminating the rainy road
dark tunnel entrance approaching in the distance

segments.scene_description: Driving on a rain-slicked elevated highway at night, approaching a dark tunnel entrance. Yellow guardrails line the left side while street lamps pierce through the heavy fog and rain. A vehicle travels ahead in the same lane.

events.description: entering enclosed tunnel from rainy highway environment
approaching tunnel exit with bright light visible at the end

agents.ego_description: driving through the enclosed tunnel with artificial ceiling lighting

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls lining both sides of the tunnel interior
linear row of overhead fluorescent lights along the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the sheltered tunnel environment, leaving the rain behind. Concrete walls flank the road while artificial lights illuminate the path ahead. The scene transitions from neon-lit fog to warm artificial lighting as the tunnel exit approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial district with digital advertising

events.description: exiting tunnel into rainy city street with bright neon lights and billboards

agents.ego_description: navigating city streets, passing illuminated billboards and storefronts while turning at intersections

entered.detail: large illuminated digital advertising screen on building facade
bright pink neon sign glowing through the rain
multi-story urban buildings with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into the rain-soaked commercial district, the vehicle passes large digital billboards and pink neon signage. The environment shifts from enclosed concrete to open urban streets with multi-story buildings and glowing advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from commercial to industrial district

events.description: entering industrial area with visible fires and smoke ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through mixed urban area with increasing industrial structures and visible fires in the distance

notable_agents.action: large truck driving ahead through the rain and fog

entered.detail: large industrial buildings with metal siding and minimal lighting
orange flames and smoke rising from burning debris
elevated concrete road structure crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from commercial to industrial as the vehicle passes under an overpass. Large warehouse structures appear on the left while orange fires glow in the distance through the rain. Traffic increases slightly with a large truck ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial wasteland with burning barrels and heavy smoke

events.description: driving through thick smoke plumes reducing visibility significantly

agents.ego_description: navigating through dark industrial zone with fire-lit surroundings and heavy smoke

notable_agents.action: military-style truck driving ahead through dense smoke

entered.detail: metal barrels with open flames providing orange ambient light
destroyed or abandoned industrial structures with broken walls
thick dark smoke hanging low over the road reducing visibility

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dark industrial wasteland filled with smoke and fire. Burning barrels line the left side while ruins of industrial buildings flank the road. Visibility drops significantly as the car drives through thick smoke plumes, following a truck ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked metropolis that transforms from a neon-lit urban center into a desolate industrial wasteland. It begins on a slick elevated highway under heavy fog and rain, following another vehicle toward the mouth of a dark tunnel. As the camera enters the tunnel, the rain vanishes and the atmosphere shifts from cold neon fog to warm artificial lighting against concrete walls before emerging back into the storm. The scene then opens into a vibrant commercial district filled with towering buildings and glowing pink digital billboards, which gradually give way to an industrial zone as the vehicle passes under an overpass. Finally, the environment descends into a dark wasteland of smoke and ruins, where the camera follows a large truck through thick plumes of smog and past burning barrels.
